prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 华南师范大学在天津市综合类2024年最低录取位次约7977名，2025年约7725名，近两年位次小幅前移约252名，2025年基准位次约7725名；该校在天津市综合类招生计划2024年、2025年均为5人，2026年计划仍为5人，招生规模连续三年持平，无扩缩变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华 南师范大学是211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第79名，近年排名稳定在75-80名区间，属于中上水平全国重点师范大学；2026年高考周期 声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及学校管理类事件，无显著负面舆情；抖音热度排名第70，评价为"一般"，短视频平台关注度不高；近年无投档断档或录取异常记录，报考心理较 为平稳；第五轮学科评估中，心理学获评A+（全国顶尖），马克思主义理论获评A，教育学、体育学获评A-，师范类学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有一定吸引 力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 天津市2026年高考考生总数约82000人，较2025年71938人增长约14%，考生规模明显扩大，竞争加剧；省控线本科批2025年为476分，近年稳中有升， 卷面难度变化不大；华南师范大学位于广东省广州市，距天津市较远，属于跨省招生；该校在天津招生人数极少（仅5人），本地考生跨省报考师范类院校的意 愿受地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次7725名、2026年招生计划持平、天津市考生总数大幅增长约14%等因素，竞争加剧推动位次后移；同时学校声誉平 稳、无负面舆情，优势学科（心理学A+）对考生有一定吸引力，部分抵消竞争压力。预测2026年最低录取位次约7800名，区间7300-8300名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 华南师范大学在天津市综合类仅招2个专业共5人，招生规模极小。位次在预测区间（7300-8300名）内，建议以二档汉语言文学（师范）为主力报考目标；位次明显优于区间下限 （7300名以内）可冲刺一档应用心理学；位次接近区间上限（8300名左右）需谨慎评估。由于招生人数极少，位次波动风险较大，建议同时准备其他院校保底方案。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: South China Normal University's minimum admission ranking in Tianjin Comprehensive category in 2024 was approximately 7977, in 2025 approximately 7725, with a slight forward shift of about 252 positions over the past two years, and a baseline ranking of approximately 7725 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan in Tianjin Comprehensive category was 5 students in both 2024 and 2025, and the 2026 plan remains 5 students, with enrollment scale unchanged for three consecutive years, no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking in 2026 is approximately 79th, with recent rankings stable in the 75-80 range, belonging to the upper-middle level national key normal university; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management incidents, with no significant negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 70th, evaluated as 'average', with low attention on short video platforms; in recent years, there have been no admission interruptions or abnormal admission records, and the application psychology is relatively stable; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Psychology received A+ (top in the country), Marxist Theory received A, Education and Physical Education received A-, with outstanding strength in normal disciplines, which has a certain appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The total number of candidates for the 2026 Tianjin college entrance examination is approximately 82,000, an increase of about 14% from 71,938 in 2025, with a significant expansion in candidate scale and intensified competition; the provincial control line for undergraduate batch in 2025 was 476 points, with a steady upward trend in recent years, and little change in exam difficulty; South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, relatively far from Tianjin, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment; the university enrolls very few students in Tianjin (only 5), and local candidates' willingness to apply for normal universities across provinces is limited by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 7725, unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, and a significant increase of about 14% in the total number of Tianjin candidates, intensified competition pushes the ranking backward; at the same time, the school's reputation is stable with no negative public opinion, and advantageous disciplines (Psychology A+) have a certain appeal to candidates, partially offsetting competitive pressure. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 7800, with a range of 7300-8300.

None at present.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: South China Normal University enrolls only 2 majors with a total of 5 students in the Tianjin Comprehensive category, with an extremely small enrollment scale. If the ranking is within the predicted range (7300-8300), it is recommended to take the second-tier Chinese Language and Literature (Normal) as the main application target; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 7300), you can aim for the first-tier Applied Psychology; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 8300), careful evaluation is needed. Due to the very small number of enrolled students, the ranking fluctuation risk is high, and it is recommended to prepare other backup schools at the same time.
